seoTitle: Burra vs Burrungule — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Burra and Burrungule. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Burra and Burrungule.
heading: Burra vs Burrungule — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Burra, South Australia and Burrungule, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Burra has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Burrungule (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Burra or Burrungule safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Burra has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Burrungule scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Burra scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Burrungule scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Burra or Burrungule?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Burra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
